testcase.name: tests.test_challenge_api
testcase.error: tests/test_challenge_api.py:8: in <module> class TestChallengeAPI(unittest.TestCase): tests/test_challenge_api.py:11: in TestChallengeAPI api = maproulette.Challenge(config) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ maproulette/api/challenge.py:11: in __init__ super().__init__(configuration=config) maproulette/api/maproulette_server.py:18: in __init__ if self.__check_health(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ maproulette/api/maproulette_server.py:30: in __check_health response = self.session.get( ^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Challenge' object has no attribute 'session'

testcase.name: tests.test_project_api
testcase.error: tests/test_project_api.py:7: in <module> class TestProjectAPI(unittest.TestCase): tests/test_project_api.py:10: in TestProjectAPI api = maproulette.Project(config) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ maproulette/api/project.py:11: in __init__ super().__init__(configuration=config) maproulette/api/maproulette_server.py:18: in __init__ if self.__check_health(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ maproulette/api/maproulette_server.py:30: in __check_health response = self.session.get( ^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Project' object has no attribute 'session'

testcase.name: tests.test_server
testcase.error: tests/test_server.py:9: in <module> class TestAPI(unittest.TestCase): tests/test_server.py:12: in TestAPI server = maproulette.MapRouletteServer(configuration=config) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ maproulette/api/maproulette_server.py:18: in __init__ if self.__check_health(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ maproulette/api/maproulette_server.py:30: in __check_health response = self.session.get( ^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'MapRouletteServer' object has no attribute 'session'

testcase.error: tests/test_task_api.py:7: in <module> class TestTaskAPI(unittest.TestCase): tests/test_task_api.py:10: in TestTaskAPI api = maproulette.Task(config) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ maproulette/api/task.py:11: in __init__ super().__init__(configuration=config) maproulette/api/maproulette_server.py:18: in __init__ if self.__check_health(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ maproulette/api/maproulette_server.py:30: in __check_health response = self.session.get( ^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Task' object has no attribute 'session'

testcase.name: tests.test_user_api
testcase.error: tests/test_user_api.py:6: in <module> class TestUserAPI(unittest.TestCase): tests/test_user_api.py:9: in TestUserAPI api = maproulette.User(config) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ maproulette/api/user.py:10: in __init__ super().__init__(configuration=config) maproulette/api/maproulette_server.py:18: in __init__ if self.__check_health(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ maproulette/api/maproulette_server.py:30: in __check_health response = self.session.get( ^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'User' object has no attribute 'session'
